# Express Prisma Server
Node.js backend server built using **Express.js** and **Mongoose** in mvc pattern. This project demonstrates integrating Express with Mongoose ORM to build a RESTful API.

## Features
- Express.js for the webserver
- Mongoose ORM for database management
- JWT Authentication for user login and access control
- User management and CRUD operations
- Support for creating and managing categories and products

## Tech Stack
- **Node.js**: JavaScript runtime for building the backend
- **Express.js**: Web framework for building RESTful APIs
- **Mongoose**: Next-generation ORM for MongoDB and TypeScript
- **JWT**: JSON Web Tokens for authentication
- **MongoDB**: Nosql database for storing data

## Live Server
- [Live Server](https://express-mongoose-server.onrender.com/)
